rules.reason: CASL s.6 requires (a) express consent (with limited implied-consent exceptions), (b) sender ID, and (c) a working unsubscribe mechanism in every commercial electronic message. Penalties up to $10M per violation for organisations.
rules.remediation_hint: Use opt-in consent capture with audit log, identify the sender, and include a one-click unsubscribe that takes effect within 10 business days.
